summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of club name truncation fix across GuessIt football prediction app. The main agent's restructuring of card layouts successfully resolved truncation issues. Testing confirmed no ellipsis ('...') found on mobile (390px) or desktop (1920px) viewports, with team names displaying fully without character-level clipping.
passed_tests: Homepage match cards display team names without truncation on mobile (390px)
Homepage match cards display team names without truncation on desktop (1920px)
No ellipsis ('...') detected anywhere in the interface on mobile view
No ellipsis ('...') detected anywhere in the interface on desktop view
Team names like 'ST. PAULI', '1. FC KÖLN', 'HOFFENHEIM', 'DORTMUND' display fully
Mobile layout uses proper responsive design with clean alignment
Desktop layout maintains side-by-side arrangement as expected
Layout stays clean on mobile with no overflow issues
Responsive breakpoints work correctly (flex-col on mobile, sm:flex-row on desktop)
Login and authentication flow works correctly
Team name spans use 'break-words leading-tight' implementation successfully
